description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a double-edged blade, featuring a pointed tip and a dark, metallic finish. The blade appears to have subtle discolorations or stains, possibly resembling dried blood or patina, giving it a weathered or battle-worn appearance. The crossguard is simple and straight, extending horizontally to provide hand protection. The handle is cylindrical with a ribbed or grooved texture for grip, ending in a rounded pommel that adds balance and weight. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible engravings or decorative elements, suggesting a focus on function over ornamentation. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with the handle possibly wrapped or textured for improved handling.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a dark, metallic blade, simple crossguard, and ribbed handle ending in a rounded pommel. The blade shows signs of wear or staining, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and ribbed handle with rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness and sharpness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle details from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible features.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, ribbed texture, metallic, rounded pommel
